description: Perform a Principal Component Analysis (PCA) on the Big Five Personality Traits dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv. Include all five personality variables (Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Neuroticism, and Openness) in the analysis. Configure the PCA using varimax rotation and extraction based on Eigenvalues greater than 1. The final output must include a scree plot and a path diagram. Save the analysis as a JASP file to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFive_PCA.jasp.
